name: Tower Spring
explanation: An original model of a tall studio spring-reverb tank: a long cascade of dispersive all-pass lines smears transients into a clean, bright 'boing/chirp' that feeds a long, lightly-modulated stereo feedback delay for a smooth, hi-fi tail up to several seconds. Decay lengthens the tail, Tone tilts dark to bright, Boing sets the dispersion/chirp amount, Width spreads the two decorrelated spring loops, and Mix blends dry/wet.
